parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Robber and asserts that he robbed Paul. According to the game rules, the Robber swaps their card with another player's card, meaning if Justin had robbed Paul, he would no longer be the Robber. Furthermore, Mitchell claims to be the Seer and saw the Robber card in the center, which would mean no player is the Robber. Justin's logically impossible claim and his attempts to manipulate the narrative make him the most likely Werewolf.

Furthermore, Mitchell claims to be the Seer and saw the Robber card in the center, which would mean no player is the Robber. Justin's logically impossible claim and his attempts to manipulate the narrative make him the most likely Werewolf.
